assertions.reason: packages/web/app/components/WaitlistForm.tsx is absent and no WaitlistForm references were found under packages/web.
packages/api/package.json does not contain @planetscale/database in dependencies or devDependencies.
The specs PUT handler explicitly whitelists title, description, priority, status, acceptanceCriteria, and projectId in .set() and does not spread the raw request body.
packages/api/.env.example defines DATABASE_URL with a postgresql:// URL.
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY access is consistent in packages/api/src and uses process.env in the runtime route handlers.
Both packages include vitest config files and test scripts invoking vitest, and bun run test succeeded in packages/api and packages/web with exit code 0 and no config errors.
